debug_info.goal:
ι : Type
oSpec : OracleSpec ι
StmtIn StmtOut WitIn WitOut : Type
n : ℕ
pSpec : ProtocolSpec n
stmt : StmtIn
wit : WitIn
prover : Prover oSpec StmtIn WitIn StmtOut WitOut pSpec
⊢ Prod.fst <$>
      ((simulateQ loggingOracle).toFun (pSpec.FullTranscript × StmtOut × WitOut)
          (@Prover.run ι oSpec StmtIn StmtOut WitIn WitOut n pSpec stmt wit prover)).run =
    @Prover.run ι oSpec StmtIn StmtOut WitIn WitOut n pSpec stmt wit prover

failed_attempts:
<;>
    (try rfl) <;>
    (try simp_all [runWithLog, run, simulateQ_map_fst]) <;>
    (try aesop)
  
  exact h_main

<;> rfl
  have h₂ : Prod.fst <$> (simulateQ loggingOracle (prover.run stmt wit)).run = prover.run stmt wit := by
    have h₃ : simulateQ loggingOracle (prover.run stmt wit) = (Option.map (fun x => (x, [])) ∘ partialEval) (prover.run stmt wit) := by
      rfl
    rw [h₃]
    have h₄ : Prod.fst ∘ (Option.map (fun x => (x, []) : _ → _)) = Option.map id := by
      ext x
      simp [Option.map, Function.comp]
      <;> cases x <;> simp_all [Option.map, Function.comp] <;> rfl
    simp_all [h₄]
    <;> ext x <;> simp_all [PartialEvaluation.evals, Option.map] <;> aesop
  calc
    Prod.fst <$> prover.runWithLog stmt wit = Prod.fst <$> (simulateQ loggingOracle (prover.run stmt wit)).run := by rw [h₁]
    _ = prover.run stmt wit := by rw [h₂]

<;> 
  (try simp_all [run, runWithLog, runToRound, runWithLogToRound, simulateQ_bind, simulateQ_pure, simulateQ_fail, loggingOracle_impl, loggingOracle_impl_succ])
  <;>
  (try simp_all [Fin.last])
  <;>
  (try rfl)
  <;>
  (try simp_all [prod.fst, prod.snd])
  <;>
  (try aesop)

rfl
    _ = prover.run stmt wit := by
      apply h_main
